title: QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS - 211info
text: CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK KLAMATH FALLS OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability. Events encourage people to interact and participate in activities such as movie night, picnic in the park, parades, BBQ with the Bend Elks, sensory friendly movies, other sensory friendly events, sledding, and other events. This provides networking opportunities for families. 2701 Foothills Boulevard Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-8559 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Parent to Parent Networking * Disabilities Issues Parent/Child Activity Groups * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY EDUCATION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK KLAMATH FALLS OFFICE
